title: My First Year Sober: Real Talk
description: Personal-story carousel from a community member (Jess) on the highs and lows of the first 365 days without alcohol. Honest, non-romanticised, framed as peer-to-peer rather than testimonial.
hook: Nobody talks about the boring parts of getting sober.
keyMessage: Sobriety is mostly mundane — and that's the point.

cta.text: What surprised you about getting sober? Tell us below.

strategy.keyMessage: Sobriety is mostly mundane — and that's the point.
strategy.ctaText: What surprised you about getting sober? Tell us below.

creativePlan.hook: Nobody talks about the boring parts of getting sober.

carousel.hook: Nobody talks about the boring parts of getting sober.

slides.headline: The first month was loud
slides.body: I thought I'd feel free. I felt furious. About everything. Traffic, my job, my family, the way the dog chewed his food. Turns out alcohol had been muting all of that for years.
slides.altText: A woman in her 30s sitting on a kitchen floor, knees pulled up, holding a coffee mug.

slides.headline: Months 2–4 were quiet
slides.body: Same job. Same family. Same chewing dog. Nothing changed except I stopped being surprised by my own anger.
slides.altText: Same woman walking a dog on a dirt path, mid-stride, looking down.

slides.headline: Month 6 was the surprise
slides.body: I was at a wedding. Drank seltzer. Was bored for three full hours. Drove home. Realised I hadn't been bored at a wedding since I was 22. I'd been a little buzzed at every single one.
slides.altText: A wedding reception in soft golden hour light, the woman sitting at a table with a glass of seltzer.

slides.headline: The rest was just… my life
slides.body: 365 days in. I'm not transformed. I'm not a 'sobriety person.' I'm just a person who isn't drinking. The boring parts are kind of the whole point.
slides.altText: Close-up of the woman laughing at something off-frame, in natural light.

slides.headline: Your turn
slides.body: Drop a moment in the comments — what surprised you about getting sober? The boring stuff counts.
slides.altText: A handwritten note that reads 'tell me a boring sober moment' on a wood table.
